message:
Fix auto-shrink not triggering, remove debug tracing

- Call _evaluateAutoShrink() after each _onWindowReady() so windows
  beyond the focus-rank threshold get auto-shrunk as they appear
- Add first-frame fallback timeout (500ms) for headless/no-render
  environments where first-frame signal never fires
- Remove all debug tracing (/tmp/mb_trace.txt, _debugWriteState)

Verified: 28 unit tests pass, extension enables/disables cleanly
in headless GNOME Shell 50.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
